title: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) Earnings Dates & Report
text: Comprehensive earnings information for Robinhood Markets covering dates, historical results, and analyst forecasts. Recent Earnings History: Q1 2026 (April 28): Reported EPS $0.38 vs $0.39 est, Revenue $1.07B vs $1.14B est - MISS. Q4 2025 (February 10): Reported EPS $0.66 vs $0.63 est - BEAT, Revenue $1.28B vs $1.35B est - MISS. Q3 2024 (October 30): Revenue $637M, up 36% YoY, second-highest ever. Adjusted EBITDA margins 42%, up 13 points. Q2 2024 (July 31): Revenue $682M, up 40% YoY. EPS $0.21 vs $0.03 prior year. Q1 2024 (May 8): Strong results with options and crypto revenue growth. Full Year 2025: Record revenue $4.5B, record EPS $2.05, record net deposits $68B. Upcoming Earnings Dates: Q2 2026 expected late July 2026. Next Earnings: July 29, 2026 currently scheduled. Analyst Estimates: Q2 2026 EPS expected $0.41, Revenue $1.17B. Full year 2026 EPS forecast averaging $2.19B earnings. Earnings Trends: Strong growth trajectory 2023-2025 with some volatility in 2026. Crypto revenue highly volatile but overall trend positive. Gold subscriber growth providing stability. Transaction volume cycles important to monitor.
